recommendations.title: Kundo: Age of the Rampant
recommendations.overview: In 1862, amidst the rule of the late Joseon dynasty in Korea, a band of fighters named Kundo rise against the unjust authorities.

recommendations.title: Nameless Gangster
recommendations.overview: A corrupt customs official joins forces with a vicious gangster to form the most powerful crime partnership in Busan.

recommendations.title: The Untouchables
recommendations.overview: Elliot Ness, an ambitious prohibition agent, is determined to take down Al Capone. In order to achieve this goal, he forms a group given the nickname “The Untouchables”.

recommendations.title: Hope
recommendations.overview: After 8-year-old So-won narrowly survives a brutal sexual assault, her family labors to help her heal while coping with their own rage and grief.

recommendations.title: The Closet
recommendations.overview: After moving into a new house, a young girl begins displaying strange and disturbing behavior until, one day, she disappears behind a closet. While the devastated father is left with no clue about his daughter's disappearance, an exorcist shows up to

recommendations.title: The King and the Clown
recommendations.overview: Two clowns living in Korea's Chosun Dynasty get arrested for staging a play that satirizes the king. They are dragged to the palace and threatened with execution but are given a chance to save their lives if they can make the king laugh.

recommendations.title: The Yellow Sea
recommendations.overview: A Korean man in China takes an assassination job in South Korea to make money and find his missing wife. But when the job is botched, he is forced to go on the run from the police and the gangsters who paid him.

recommendations.title: Joint Security Area
recommendations.overview: Two North Korean soldiers are killed in the border area between North and South Korea, prompting an investigation by a neutral body. The sergeant is the shooter, but the lead investigator, a Swiss-Korean woman, receives differing accounts from the tw

recommendations.title: Welcome to Dongmakgol
recommendations.overview: Based on the long running play by Jang Jin, the story is set in Korea during the Korean War in 1950. Soldiers from both the North and South, as well as an American pilot, find themselves in a secluded and naively idealistic village, its residents una

recommendations.title: Confidential Assignment
recommendations.overview: When a crime organization from North Korea crosses borders and enters South Korean soil, a South Korean detective must cooperate with a North Korean detective to investigate their whereabouts.
